# Extract the action ID from the page to submit the server action ACTION_ID="00f3b2e00d887db8614927c37b6170d6027d86debe" # Submit the sync form curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/admin/catalog \ -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \ -H "Accept: text/html" \ -F "\$ACTION_ID_${ACTION_ID}=" \ -F "0=" \ --max-time 10 2>&1 | python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read() # Extract last synced time m = re.search(r'Last synced:\s*(.*?)\s*·', html) if m: print(f'Last synced: {m.group(1).strip()}') else: print('No sync timestamp found (could be still \"No sync has been run yet\")') # Count products count = len(re.findall(r']*>\s*\d+\s*', html)) print(f'Product count: {count}') # Check for sync status if 'Product Catalog' in html: print('Page renders correctly') "

# Better verification of the sync response
ACTION_ID="00f3b2e00d887db8614927c37b6170d6027d86debe"

curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/admin/catalog \
  -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
  -H "Accept: text/html" \
  -F "\$ACTION_ID_${ACTION_ID}=" \
  -F "0=" \
  --max-time 10 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read()

# Check for sync timestamp
has_sync = 'Last synced' in html
has_no_sync = 'No sync has been run yet' in html
print(f'Has sync timestamp: {has_sync}')
print(f'Says no sync yet: {has_no_sync}')

# Count product rows (using the active status pill as marker)
active_count = len(re.findall(r'#dafbe1', html))
print(f'Active status badges: {active_count} (should be 5)')

# Verify all product names are present
for name in ['Laptop', 'Phone', 'Tablet', 'Headphones', 'Watch']:
    print(f'  Contains \"{name}\": {name in html}')

# Check the form is still there
print(f'Form present: {\"Sync latest catalog\" in html}')
print(f'Page title correct: {\"Product Catalog\" in html}')
" 2>&1

# First sync
ACTION_ID="00f3b2e00d887db8614927c37b6170d6027d86debe"

echo "=== Initial GET (before sync) ==="
curl -s http://localhost:3000/admin/catalog --max-time 10 | python3 -c "
import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read()
prices = re.findall(r'\$<!-- -->(\d+)', html)
print('Prices:', ', '.join(prices))
m = re.search(r'Last synced:.*?<time[^>]*>(.*?)</time>', html)
print('Last synced:', m.group(1).strip() if m else 'NONE')
"

echo ""
echo "=== After sync #1 ==="
